name: Ander Dam se Eende
overview: Bobby van Jaarsveld and Brendan Peyper go on a road trip across America in an RV: from the big city hustle and bustle of New York to the country rhythms of Nashville, the blues soul of Memphis and the pristine silence of the Grand Canyon. Each destination brings new people, new sounds and new discoveries that deeply touch the two artists.

trailers.title: Amptelike voorskou – Ander dam se eende | S1 | Ep 0 | kykNET
